comments: Approved after reviewing commit a89dd50, the contract, and the result artifact. The commit scope matches the execution result artifact: package.json, README.md, README_zh-CN.md, documentation/EN/getting-started/installation.md, documentation/ZH/getting-started/installation.md, and task artifacts only. Root package.json includes both prepublishOnly and mcp scripts. README.md, README_zh-CN.md, and the EN/ZH installation guides document the Git clone plus local npm install workaround for NPM 404 installation failures. No runtime DAG execution engine implementation occurred, and no active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json semantic changes were present in this commit.
